## initLogger() function

Initialize the logger: sets the plugin name (for the log file path) AND extracts --log-level from args in one call. Returns the detected log level, or undefined if --log-level was not found.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function initLogger(pluginName: string, args: string[]): string | undefined
```

</td></tr>
